2023 Webinar on 'Trends and Prospects of Plant Biotechnology' on 19th June 2023 Webinar on 'Genomics in human health and medicine' by Prof. Jata Shankar on 16th May 2023 Prof. Sudhir Kumar delivered a webinar on Teaching and Learning for school and college faculty of Himachal and other states on 16th January, 2021. Prof. Sudhir Kumar delivered an invited WebTalk to B.Sc. final year students of RKMV, Shimla on the topic "Career Opportunities for Graduates in Life-Sciences" on 11th June 2021. A webinar "Biogas From Food Waste: Himachal Pradesh Tackles the Looming Energy Challenge"  15 September,2020 Admission Webinar by Prof. Sudhir Syal, HoD, Biotechnology/Bioinformatics, JUIT on 6th August,2020 Highlights of Biotechnology and Bioinformatics Department by HOD Prof. Sudhir Syal on 16th July,2020 A webinar was delivered for school, college and Universities faculties on Teaching and Learning by Prof. Sudhir Kumar 17 October, 2020. 75 participants of Himachal and other states attended this webinar in online mode.
